sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78063" key="paraireto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραιρ-ετός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n78063.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">which may be removed</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taken away</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πλοῦτος . . οὐ π.</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Mémoires de la Mission arch. de Perse</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg007:20:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20.91</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Susa</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
